title: Meta faces New Mexico trial that could force changes to Facebook, other platforms
summary: A New Mexico trial could force Meta to overhaul its social media platforms. The state accuses Meta of addicting young users and failing to protect children. A judge may order sweeping changes, potentially leading Meta to leave the state.

title: GameStop makes $56 billion takeover bid for eBay
summary: GameStop has launched a $55.5 billion takeover bid for eBay, aiming to transform the online marketplace into a formidable competitor to Amazon. The offer, valued at $125 per share, includes a mix of stock and cash, representing a significant premium.

title: Samsung Electronics appoints new TV chief amid mounting competition
summary: Samsung Electronics has appointed a new head for its TV division. This leadership change comes as the company faces intense competition from Chinese manufacturers. The new head is expected to bring new ideas to the TV business. Samsung's TV profits have recently declined due to market challenges.
